description: Durable decision-memory store for Hermes backlog, workflow, skill, and hook reviews. Keep only redacted execution metadata here so review helpers can turn observations into recommendations.

records.expected: Weekly and stale-item review should reuse durable telemetry instead of reconstructing a session from scratch.
records.observed: The decision-memory store is now durable, redacted, and referenced by the weekly/stale review playbooks and backlog README.

field_notes.subject_id: Stable identifier for the thing being reviewed
field_notes.expected: Short description of what was supposed to happen
field_notes.observed: Short description of what actually happened
evidence: File paths, commands, or durable references only

consumer_notes: Read by backlog and review helpers during weekly and stale-item cadence runs.
Use it to influence prioritization, skill selection, and keep/defer/drop decisions.
Never store tokens, passwords, raw prompts, or other sensitive material here.
